title: Honeywell 40003916-001 5 Wire Compatible 22mm & 28mm 2 Port Motorized Zone Valve Actuator Motor (Normally Closed) V4043H1056 272848 - Hanicks
features: Compatible Replacement Actuator Motor – Designed to replace Honeywell 40003916-001 actuator heads used on V4043H series 2-port motorised zone valves.
Fits 22mm & 28mm Valve Bodies – Suitable for standard domestic central heating systems using V4043H1056 / 272848 zone valves.
5-Wire Installation – Supplied with 1 metre 5-core cable, enabling straightforward wiring to typical heating control systems.
Spring Return Operation – Motor opens the valve when powered and automatically returns closed when power is removed.
Manual Override Lever – Allows manual operation for system filling, draining or testing.
Quick Powerhead Replacement – The actuator head can be replaced without draining down the heating system, reducing installation time.
Low Power Consumption – Approximately 6W operation at 230-240V, suitable for standard UK heating controls.
Operating Temperature Range – Designed for heating system water temperatures from 5°C to 88°C.
description: Hanicks 2 Port Motorised Zone Valve Actuator Head – Compatible Replacement The Hanicks 2 Port Motorised Zone Valve Actuator Head is a compatible replacement designed for use with selected 22mm and 28mm 2 port motorised heating zone valves. Engineered for reliable performance in domestic central heating systems, this 5 wire actuator head is suitable as a replacement for Honeywell 40003916-001 and fits applications commonly associated with V4043H1056 and 272848 style valve systems. A zone valve actuator controls the flow of heated water through different heating zones within a central heating system. When an actuator becomes faulty it can cause issues such as heating remaining on continuously, heating failing to activate correctly, or the valve not responding to the thermostat or programmer. The Hanicks compatible actuator motor is designed to restore reliable heating control. With its 5 wire configuration and normally closed spring return operation, the actuator opens when power is applied and automatically closes when power is removed to ensure safe heating system operation. The integrated manual override lever allows the valve to be opened manually for system filling, draining, or testing, making servicing easier for installers and heating engineers. Compatible Part References 40003916-001 V4043H1056 272848 Technical Information Brand: Hanicks Product Type: 2 Port Motorised Zone Valve Actuator Head Operation: Normally Closed Wiring: 5 Wire Valve Type: 2 Port Motorised Heating Zone Valve Compatible Sizes: 22mm & 28mm Application: Domestic Central Heating Systems Important Compatibility Information This is a Hanicks branded compatible replacement part and is not manufactured by Honeywell. Manufacturer names and part numbers are used for compatibility and identification purposes only. Please ensure your existing actuator, wiring configuration, and valve type match before purchase.
